final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo of a muscular athlete performing a deadlift in a professional gym with industrial-style interior.

Style/medium: photorealistic editorial sports photography, gritty and raw aesthetic
Composition: low-angle medium shot, slightly below waist height, 50mm prime lens, shallow depth of field isolating the athlete against the background
Subject: heavily muscular athlete with sharply defined muscle striations, veins visible on forearms and biceps, sweat droplets on skin catching the light, powerful deadlift stance — bar loaded, back arched, full tension in the pull
Scene/backdrop: industrial-style gym interior — exposed concrete walls, raw steel racks, rubber floor mats, heavy iron plates stacked in background
Lighting/mood: cool-toned overhead industrial lighting with blue-white cast, hard directional shadows accentuating muscle definition, dramatic and intensely masculine atmosphere
Color palette: desaturated cool base of steel grey and concrete white, deep shadow blacks, warm skin tone as the sole warm anchor against the cold environment
Materials/textures: glistening sweat on skin, knurled steel barbell texture, rough concrete wall surface, worn rubber flooring
Avoid: soft flattering light, warm golden tones, clean modern gym aesthetic, plastic-looking skin, motion blur on the bar, watermark
